info.english_meaning: to break in piecesto breakto cutto tear to pieces
info.hindI_arTa: wukaq0e karanA KaRqita karanA kAwanA viBAga karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: manTArTe KaRqate KaRqeH BedArTe KaRqayeRRici ' (Slo. 85) - devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'vidyatyavaKaRqayati vinASayati pApmanaH' (bf0 u0 57 ityatra SAM0 BA0)
'aharniSAsaMsTAM yaTAvadavaKaRqitAm' (mArka0 pu0 1670) maDye truwitAM BagnAm ityAha
'tAqitA api daRqena SastrErapi viKaRqitAH na vaSaM yozito yAnti na dAnErna ca saMstavEH' (paYcata0 460) viKaRqitA viSakalitAH
